user.title: Connect to nymea
user.description: Enter the hostname or IP address of your nymea/maveo device.

data_description.host: The hostname or IP address of your maveo box (e.g. 192.168.1.172).

ports.title: Confirm ports
ports.description: The ports below were read from your maveo box at {host}. You can change them if needed.

data_description.port: The JSON-RPC TCP port used for commands and pairing.
data_description.websocket_port: The WebSocket port used for real-time notifications.

zeroconf_confirm.title: Discovered maveo device
zeroconf_confirm.description: A maveo box was discovered at {host}. The ports below were read from the device. You can change them if needed.

data_description.port: The JSON-RPC TCP port used for commands and pairing.
data_description.websocket_port: The WebSocket port used for real-time notifications.

link.title: Pair with maveo box
link.description: Click Submit, then press the **yellow/orange button** on the back of your maveo box **within 30 seconds** to complete pairing.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure maveo box
reconfigure.description: The ports below were read from your maveo box at {host}. You can change them if needed. Enable **Re-pair device** if you also want to repeat the button pairing.

data_description.port: The JSON-RPC TCP port used for commands and pairing.
data_description.websocket_port: The WebSocket port used for real-time notifications.
data_description.repair: Check this to repeat the button pairing process and obtain a new token.

abort.not_supported: This discovery type is not supported.
